# The First Appendix

This first appendix includes all of the R chunks of code that were hidden throughout the document (using the `#| include: false` chunk option) to help with readability and/or setup.

**In the Introduction (index.qmd):**

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
# Load any R packages you need for your thesis
library(knitr)
library(ggplot2)
```

**In @ref-labels:**

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
# Load required packages
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
flights <- read.csv("data/flights.csv")
```

# The Second Appendix, for Fun
